title: Add image editing to pi-image extension
context: Add optional image_path parameter to generate_image tool for iterative image editing. Refactor api.ts to use OpenAI SDK. Use image-size for validation and aspect ratio detection.
architecture: Single tool with optional param. OpenAI SDK replaces raw fetch. image-size handles validation + dimensions.

red.description: Attempt to import 'openai' and 'image-size' in a test file — module not found error

green.description: Add openai and image-size to pi-image/package.json dependencies, run bun install

steps.name: Refactor api.ts to use OpenAI SDK for text-only generation

red.description: Rewrite api.test.ts to mock OpenAI client instead of global fetch. Assert SDK receives correct params (model, messages with text content, modalities, image_config). Run tests — they fail because api.ts still uses raw fetch.

green.description: Rewrite api.ts to instantiate OpenAI client with OpenRouter baseURL, replace fetch call with sdk.chat.completions.create(). Same function signature generateImageApi(prompt, model, aspectRatio).

refactor.description: Remove old OpenRouter response interfaces, clean up unused types.

red.description: Write validate.test.ts — test that validateImage('/path/to/real.png') returns {type:'png',width,height}, unsupported format (e.g. SVG/BMP) throws with clear message, missing file throws, non-image file throws. All fail because validate.ts doesn't exist.

green.description: Implement validateImage using image-size library. Read file via image-size imageSize(), check type against whitelist (png, jpg, jpeg, webp, gif), return type + dimensions. Throw descriptive errors for each failure case.

red.description: Add test in api.test.ts for generateImageApi with optional imageBuffer + imageMimeType params — verify SDK receives multimodal user message content array with image_url part (data URL) and text part. Test fails because generateImageApi doesn't accept these params.

green.description: Add optional imageBuffer and imageMimeType params to generateImageApi. When provided, build content as [{type:'image_url',image_url:{url:dataUrl}},{type:'text',text:prompt}] instead of plain string. When absent, keep text-only behavior.

refactor.description: Extract message content builder into a helper function.

steps.name: Wire image_path in index.ts execute() + auto-detect aspect ratio

red.description: Add tests in index.test.ts for execute() with image_path: (a) missing file throws, (b) unsupported format throws, (c) valid image sends multimodal API call and returns saved result, (d) aspect ratio auto-detected from source dimensions (e.g. 1920x1080 → '16:9'), (e) explicit aspect_ratio param overrides detection. Tests fail — image_path not in schema, no file reading logic.

green.description: Add image_path to TypeBox schema as optional String param. In execute(): if image_path provided, call validateImage to check type + get dimensions, read file as base64, compute aspect ratio from width/height (simplify GCD), pass to generateImageApi with image buffer. If no image_path, existing behavior. Update details to include whether it was an edit.

steps.name: Update tool description + renderCall for edit context

red.description: Update index.test.ts registration test to assert description contains guidance for both generate and edit modes. Assert renderCall shows the image_path when provided. Tests fail — description still says generate-only.

green.description: Update tool description to explain both modes (omit image_path to generate, provide to edit). Update renderCall to append source image path when present.

red.description: Write tests for: (a) image_path pointing to a valid file but corrupted contents (image-size returns type but file can't be base64-read cleanly), (b) API returns no images when editing (same as generate — should throw), (c) round-trip: generate then edit the output. Tests fail where edge cases aren't handled.

green.description: Add error handling for file read failures, ensure no-images check works for edit path too.

refactor.description: Review all tests for coverage gaps, clean up test helpers.

design.currentState: pi-image extension has: index.ts (registers generate_image tool), api.ts (raw fetch to OpenRouter chat completions), save.ts (base64→/tmp file), render.ts (TUI renderers), and tests for each module. Tool accepts prompt, quality, aspect_ratio. API sends text-only user message to OpenRouter with modalities:['image','text'].
design.desiredState: generate_image tool gains optional image_path param. When provided: validate file exists, use image-size to check type against whitelist (PNG/JPEG/WEBP/GIF) and detect dimensions for auto aspect ratio. Read file, base64-encode, send as multimodal user message (image + text) via OpenAI SDK. Save result as new /tmp file. When omitted: same behavior as before (text-only generate). api.ts refactored to use 'openai' npm package pointed at OpenRouter baseURL. Same tool name, same TUI render, same models.
design.patterns: Current api.ts: single generateImageApi(prompt, model, aspectRatio) → Promise<GenerateImageApiResult>. Current index.ts execute(): quality→model mapping, calls api, saves to temp, returns content+details. Test pattern: mock.module for pi-coding-agent/pi-tui/typebox, mock fetch globally, co-located test files.
design.decisions: One tool with optional image_path param. OpenAI SDK (openai package) replaces raw fetch. image-size for type detection + dimensions. Whitelist: PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF. Auto-detect aspect ratio from source image when editing, default 1:1 when generating. Always save as new file. Same models for edit/generate. Same TUI render. Explicit tool description guiding both modes.
design.questions: None — all resolved in grill-me session.
